title: Monsoon Dubai Sale
subtitle: 8% off Emirates flights through September
detail_Content:
Discover Dubai this monsoon with 8% off all Emirates fares. Glittering souks, soaring towers, and a city alive with neon — your getaway is one tap away.

What's included

  • Direct flights from Colombo
  • Generous 30kg checked baggage on Emirates Economy
  • Hotel partner discounts in Deira

Book before 30 September to lock in the offer.
